title: Hippeophyllum scortechinii
taxonomy: Hippeophyllum scortechinii is a species of orchid, specifically classified within the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Hippeophyllum, a group of orchids native to Borneo. More specifically, it is classified as a member of the tribe Coelogyneae, a group of terrestrial orchids. Further classification places Hippeophyllum scortechinii within the subtribe Coelogyninae, a subcategory of Coelogyneae. At the rank of species, Hippeophyllum scortechinii is recognized as a unique entity within the Orchidaceae family.
